chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 3087 of 2015 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8674/2015 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on CMA No.8675/2015 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.10.2019 Petitioner and his counsel are called absent. No intimation is received. This is a petition of 2015. Apparently, petitioner is no more interested. Now, it is 11:00 a.m. Dismissed on account of non- prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
